name: Chicken Teriyaki Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Chicken breasts, skinned and boned
1 bn Green onions, cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1 1/2-inch square pieces.
2. Thread each of eight 6-inch bamboo or metal skewers alternately with chicken and green onion pieces (spear onion slices through side, not lengthwise).
3. Place skewers in a shallow pan.
4. Combine soy sauce, sugar, oil, ginger and garlic; pour over skewers and brush chicken thoroughly with sauce.
5. Marinate 30 minutes.
6. Reserving marinade, remove skewers and place on rack of broiler pan.
7. Broil 3 minutes; turn over and brush with reserved marinade.
8. Broil 3 minutes longer, or until chicken is tender.
Serves: 4
From: Kikkoman recipe booklet
